home.tagline: I'm a full-stack developer who loves to create efficient, fully functional applications to satisfy the digital needs of clients. My current focus is improving my design skills to provide a better user experience on the platforms I create.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Who is...
about.bio: I'm a graduate of the University of Technology of Jamaica with a Bachelors in Computer Science. I am passionate about developing high quality software consistently and continue to do so while maintaining a high standard of professionalism. I communicate well with others and exude charismatic qualities to show I blend in well with teams of varying sizes. To see more details about me, please see my resume below or contact me to schedule an interview.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Languages, frameworks, tools, and platforms I work with.

highlights: Re-architected and rebuilt the company's core backend infrastructure using Laravel, significantly improving scalability, reliability, and long-term maintainability
Led end-to-end UI and UX enhancements across the platform, including the React web dashboard and Flutter mobile application, delivering a more intuitive and consistent user experience
Ensured seamless integration between backend services, web, and mobile applications, strengthening overall system performance and platform cohesion
Led a focused UI and UX overhaul of the employee portal within an existing C# / ASP.NET HR system, improving usability and day-to-day employee interactions
Designed and delivered a full-stack Resmark integration for the accounts department using React (frontend), ASP.NET (backend), and SQL, streamlining payment-related workflows
Replaced and upgraded ASP.NET-based payment gateways for ATL Automotive and ATL Commercial, successfully migrating to PowerTranz to improve transaction reliability and security

items.company: Shift Left Limited / Sagicor Financial Corporation
highlights: Conducted manual testing of the new IPO portal to ensure functionality, performance, and security
Designed, documented, and executed comprehensive test cases using Jira for defect tracking and project management
Collaborated with developers and QA team to support automation efforts and streamline regression testing
Led the refactoring of the backend system using Node.js, improving code maintainability and performance
Designed and implemented version 2.0.0 of the company's API, enhancing scalability and integration capabilities
Worked closely with product stakeholders to align backend development with evolving business requirements

items.company: Shift Left Limited / National Commercial Bank of Jamaica
highlights: Developed full-stack features for the Credit Card Web Portal using React (frontend) and Java Spring Boot (backend)
Assisted in developing systems to handle customer inputs for the online banking platform, improving turnaround time and user experience
Collaborated in Agile teams to deliver secure, user-focused business application solutions
Instructed students aged 12-18 in Python, introducing core programming principles and logical thinking
Delivered advanced programming courses in Java and JavaScript, tailored to student aptitude levels
Promoted creativity and innovation in programming through hands-on projects and interactive learning methods
